playground.title: Playground
playground.description: Try ES-Plus components live and preview the result instantly.
playground.dialogHint: Full JS syntax — write render: (h) => h('div', ...) and a configBtn array (each button's click(_, { close }) handles itself). h is injected by useDialog at call time.

home.badge: 🚀 Vue 3 + Element Plus · Vue 2 + Element UI
home.title: ES-Plus
home.tagline2: One JSON · two Vue render targets · AI-friendly
home.feature1Desc: 30 lines of JSON replace 200 lines of Vue templates — unified abstraction for the 80% of CRUD pages that look the same.
home.feature2Desc: EsForm nested in EsTable auto-syncs search / reset / pagination — zero event handlers.
home.feature3Desc: Vue 3 + Element Plus and Vue 2 + Element UI share the same JSON config — migrate progressively at zero cost.
home.feature4Desc: JSON is easier than .vue templates for an LLM to generate — small error surface, statically validatable, diffable.
home.esFormDesc: Advanced form — configurable field definitions, conditional validation, async data loading.
home.esTableDesc: Advanced table — configurable columns, auto pagination, request integration.
home.useDialogDesc: Programmatic dialog hook — JSX render, form integration, nested dialogs.

aiLive.tag: Generate a CRUD page from one sentence
aiLive.title: Write a sentence, see a config, render a page
aiLive.subtitle: JSON is the format LLMs generate best — small error surface, statically validatable, diffable.
aiLive.promptPlaceholder: e.g. User management page. Search by name, phone, status. Table columns: name, phone, email, status, created at. Supports add / edit / delete.
aiLive.noKeyHint: Local rule engine — no API key needed
aiLive.previewPlaceholder: Pick a preset or describe what you need, then click Generate.
aiLive.ctaFull: Full AI CRUD Generator (OpenAI / Claude supported)

codePlayground.noSource: No source code for this example.

aiCrud.title: AI CRUD Generator
aiCrud.description: Natural-language prompt → full CRUD page config. Try out a config-driven component library in the AI era.
aiCrud.promptPlaceholder:
Describe the CRUD page you want, e.g.

User management page. Search by name, phone, status. Table columns: name, phone, email, status, created at. Supports add / edit / delete.
aiCrud.emptyCode: Enter a prompt and click Generate.
aiCrud.emptyPreview: Generate first to see the live preview.
aiCrud.emptyJson: Generate first to see the JSON.
aiCrud.settingsAlert: With an API key, real AI will generate the config (OpenAI-compatible — DeepSeek / Qwen / Moonshot etc.). Without a key, the local rule engine is used.
aiCrud.copyFailed: Copy failed — please select and copy manually.
aiCrud.settingsSavedAi: Saved. AI engine will be used.
aiCrud.settingsSavedRule: No API key — falling back to the local rule engine.
aiCrud.banner: Demonstrates how the MCP server's tools turn natural language into a runnable es-plus config. The same logic runs when Claude Code calls the MCP server in your IDE.

chat.placeholder: Describe a CRUD page. Press Enter to send (Shift+Enter for newline).

trace.empty: Describe a CRUD page on the left and the MCP tool flow shows up here — tool name, input, output, validation result, duration — the same trace an MCP-aware IDE client sees.

doc.untranslatedNotice: ⚠️ This page hasn't been translated yet — showing the Chinese version. Contributions welcome on GitHub.
